_comment: Example PostToolUse hook: runs `npm run typecheck` after Claude edits TypeScript files. Drop this content into ~/.claude/settings.json (user-wide) or .claude/settings.json (project-only). Merge with existing settings — don't overwrite.

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|mts|cts)$'; then npm run typecheck 2>&1; fi
